name: Tropical Chicken Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 6 chicken breast halves (4 oz each, skinned, boned, cut into 1-1/2 inch pieces)
1 large green pepper (seeded and cut into 2-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lime juice, vegetable oil, and honey in a shallow dish.
2. Add chicken; toss gently. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for 8 hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove chicken from marinade, reserving the marinade.
4. Alternate chicken, onion, pepper, papaya, and pineapple on 6 (12") skewers.
5. Coat grill rack with Pam; place rack on grill over medium-hot coals.
6. Place kabobs on rack, and cook for 15-20 minutes or until done, turning and basting frequently with reserved marinade.
